results.rendered_html:
śūdrā A woman of the Śūdra tribe.
Comp.
— bhāryaḥ one who has a Śūdra woman for his wife.
— vedanaṃ marrying a Śūdra woman.
— sutaḥ the son of a Śūdra woman. (the father being of any caste).
